user.title: Connect to Solarman API
user.description: Enter your Solarman developer API credentials. Your password will be stored as a SHA-256 hash.

error.invalid_auth: Invalid credentials. Check your App ID, App Secret, username, and password.
error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the Solarman API. Check your network connection.

abort.already_configured: This NeoVolta station is already configured.
